title: Genetic analysis of stalk strengh in Maize
abstract: Zuber and Loesch(1962) showed that rind thickness and crushing strength of second and third internodes of maize stick were highly negatively correlated with stalk breakage and these two characters could therefore be good indices for the measurement of resistance to stalk breakage in maize. Since than several workers have confirmed such negative correlations and have used crossing strengh....................
publication: Indian Journal of Genetics and Plant Breeding
